title: .agents/index.json
description: Machine-readable inventory of an agent-friendly repo scaffolded by docentic. Lives at .agents/index.json. Any tool that needs to know what docs are present, their tier, their merge policy, and what state the research pipeline is in can read this file.

$schema.description: URL of this schema. Enables IDE autocomplete and validation.

version.description: Schema version. Bumped on breaking changes.

product_name.description: Human-facing product name. Often the same as repo's short name.

stack.description: Detected technology labels (language, framework, database, package manager, etc.). Free-form strings.

template_version.description: Version of the docentic template that scaffolded this repo (semver).

updated.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the last update to this index.

docs.description: Inventory of spine + auto-detected doc files.

sub_agents.description: Nested AGENTS.md files in subdirectories (per-area scopes).

research.description: Research-pipeline state. Optional — present if the repo uses the research/ folder.

library_size.description: Count of research files under research/topics/

seen_urls.description: Hashes of URLs the research scouts have already seen — for dedup across runs.

orchestration.description: How the maintain-repo skill is invoked.

entry_point.description: Relative path to the entry-point skill file.

claude_skill_wrapper.description: Path to the Claude Code skill wrapper if used.

ci_workflow.description: Path to a CI workflow if the AI steps run in CI.

health.description: Self-reported health from the last validator run.

edit_authority.description: Who is allowed to open a PR that modifies this file.

merge_policy.description: Merge gate. `auto` = auto-merge if CI passes. `review` = always requires human approval. `auto_delayed:Nh` or `auto_delayed:Nd` = auto-merge after N hours/days with no objection.

source.description: For generated files: path to the script that produces this file.

critical.description: If true, this file is critical — never auto-merges regardless of merge_policy.

anchor.description: True for the system anchor (typically docs/ARCHITECTURE.md).

size_limit_lines.description: Soft size limit; validators warn when exceeded.

auto_detected.description: True if this file was added because the stack matched a trigger (e.g. UI.md for frontend repos).

trigger.description: If auto_detected, the rule that triggered inclusion.

hash.description: sha256 of the file's current content, or 'pending' before first sync.

generated_hash.description: For generated files: sha256 of what the generator last produced. Hash drift between hash and generated_hash signals a human edit.
